title: tanacetum chiliophyllum var. heimerlei
intro: Tanacetum chiliophyllum var. heimerlei is a lesser-known variant of the Tanacetum chiliophyllum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Tanacetum chiliophyllum var. heimerlei are attributed to its essential oils, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum chiliophyllum var. heimerlei can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
